title: Ricketts, Klobuchar Introduce Renewable Fuel for Ocean-Going Vessels Act
content: U.S. Senators Pete Ricketts (R-NE) and Amy Klobuchar (D-MN) introduced the Renewable Fuel for Ocean-Going Vessels Act. The bipartisan bill would allow companies to preserve Renewable Identification Number credits (RINs) under the Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS) program, when the fuel for use is in ocean-going vessels.  â€œThis legislation allows for RINs to be generated for renewable marine fuel without requiring an obligation on any parties." said Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks.
author: Analysts Account
